name: confidential_information_preposed_independent_development_qualification_passes
text:
Confidential Information means any and all non-public business, financial, technical, customer, supplier, pricing, market, proprietary and trade secret information disclosed by either party.

Confidential Information does not include information that, without use of or reference to Confidential Information, is independently developed by the Receiving Party.

name: confidential_information_detached_independent_development_qualification_checks
text:
Confidential Information means any and all non-public business, financial, technical, customer, supplier, pricing, market, proprietary and trade secret information disclosed by either party.

Confidential Information does not include materials evaluated without use of Confidential Information, or independently developed information.

name: governing_law_placeholder_requires_review
text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of [jurisdiction].

name: term_survival_ignores_unrelated_claims_survival_duration
text: This Agreement is effective on signature. Claims survive for three years.

name: term_survival_bare_term_heading_duration_passes
text: Term: three years from the Effective Date.

name: term_survival_unresolved_article_reference_requires_review
text:
Article 1 Confidentiality

The Receiving Party shall protect Confidential Information and not disclose it.

Article 2 Term and Survival

The obligations set out in Articles 1 and 99 survive expiry or termination for 3 (three) years.

name: non_circumvention_modal_negated_reference_passes
text: This Agreement may not include non-solicitation obligations or exclusivity restrictions.

name: non_circumvention_direct_dealing_restriction_checks
text: The Recipient must not circumvent the Company or deal directly with introduced parties.

name: non_circumvention_contact_transact_introduced_party_checks
text: The Recipient shall not contact or transact with any party introduced by the Company.

name: non_circumvention_bypass_company_checks
text: The Recipient shall not bypass the Company.

name: non_circumvention_deal_exclusively_checks
text: The Recipient agrees to deal exclusively with the Company.
